data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F705: Hello! I take it you're a traveler.\pHow's this? What do you say to taking\non our family of four in a series of\lPOKéMON battles?
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F785: Is that so?\nDrop in, if you change your mind!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F7B3: That's the spirit! I like you!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F7D2: Aiyah!\nYou're a lot tougher than I expected!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F7FF: Hey, all!\nI've found a pretty strong TRAINER!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F82D: Oh, my goodness! Aren't you young?\pYou must be quite the TRAINER to beat\nmy husband, though.\pIt's my turn to battle now!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F8A6: Oh, gosh!\nI can't get over how strong you are!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F8D5: There's a strong TRAINER here!\nThis one's really strong!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F90E: You're stronger than Mommy? Wow!\pBut I'm strong, too!\nReally! Honestly!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F991: How dare you make my granddaughter\ncry!\pFor that, I'm going to smack you!\nPrepare to lose!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F9EC: Kwah! You are strong...\nMy granddaughter was right...
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FA22: If you're not in any hurry, visit with\nus awhile.
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FA54: You found the ROOT FOSSIL.\pIf this FOSSIL is taken, the other\none will sink into the sand...\pTake the ROOT FOSSIL anyway?
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FAED: You found the CLAW FOSSIL.\pIf this FOSSIL is taken, the other\none will sink into the sand...\pTake the CLAW FOSSIL anyway?
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FB86: If you don't raise your POKéMON some\nmore, it could be tough to keep winning\lup through the ranks.\pI've heard the POKéMON LEAGUE's\nELITE FOUR are far stronger than\lany GYM LEADER.
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FC3A: I challenged the WINSTRATE family,\nbut four matches in a row is tough\lgoing... They destroyed me.
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FCB6: “Our family's hearts beat as one!”\nTHE WINSTRATE'S HOUSE
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FD1B: OLD LADY'S REST STOP\n“Come in and rest your tired bones.”
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FD55: TRAINER TIPS\pOne of the indicators of a POKéMON's\npowerfulness is SP. ATK. It stands for\l“SPECIAL ATTACK.”\pLikewise, SP. DEF stands for “SPECIAL\nDEFENSE.”
